key_sentences.chinese: 这道菜肴既新鲜又营养，是餐厅最受欢迎的特色菜。
key_sentences.pinyin: Zhè dào cài yáo jì xīn xiān yòu yíng yǎng, shì cān tīng zuì shòu huān yíng de tè sè cài.
key_sentences.english: This dish is both fresh and nutritious; it is the restaurant's most popular signature dish.

key_sentences.chinese: 食材越新鲜，菜的口味越好，这是厨师的基本原则。
key_sentences.pinyin: Yuè yòng xīn xiān shí cái, cài de kǒu wèi yuè hǎo, zhè shì chú shī de jī běn yuán zé.
key_sentences.english: The fresher the ingredients used, the better the flavour of the dish — this is a chef's basic principle.

key_sentences.chinese: 厨师把食材切好以后，再按照食谱调味，最后大火翻炒。
key_sentences.pinyin: Chú shī bǎ shí cái qiē hǎo yǐ hòu, zài àn zhào shí pǔ tiáo wèi, zuì hòu dà huǒ fān chǎo.
key_sentences.english: After the chef cuts the ingredients, he seasons them according to the recipe, then stir-fries them over high heat.

key_sentences.chinese: 均衡的饮食既能满足口味，又能保证每天所需的营养。
key_sentences.pinyin: Jūn héng de yǐn shí jì néng mǎn zú kǒu wèi, yòu néng bǎo zhèng měi tiān suǒ xū de yíng yǎng.
key_sentences.english: A balanced diet can both satisfy taste preferences and ensure the nutrition needed each day.

key_sentences.chinese: 越了解烹饪技术，做出来的菜肴越有特色。
key_sentences.pinyin: Yuè liǎo jiě pēng rèn jì shù, zuò chū lái de cài yáo yuè yǒu tè sè.
key_sentences.english: The more you understand cooking techniques, the more distinctive the dishes you produce.

key_sentences.chinese: 她把新鲜食材一一清洗干净，准备按照食谱烹饪一道传统美食。
key_sentences.pinyin: Tā bǎ xīn xiān shí cái yí yì qīng xǐ gān jìng, zhǔn bèi àn zhào shí pǔ pēng rèn yí dào chuán tǒng měi shí.
key_sentences.english: She washed all the fresh ingredients one by one and prepared to cook a traditional dish following a recipe.

key_sentences.chinese: 好的厨师会利用新鲜食材来烹饪特色菜肴。
key_sentences.pinyin: Hǎo de chú shī huì lì yòng xīn xiān shí cái lái pēng rèn tè sè cài yáo.
key_sentences.english: A good chef uses fresh ingredients to cook specialty dishes.

key_sentences.chinese: 这道菜的营养丰富，口味独特，是本店的特色。
key_sentences.pinyin: Zhè dào cài de yíng yǎng fēng fù, kǒu wèi dú tè, shì běn diàn de tè sè.
key_sentences.english: This dish is nutritious and has a unique taste; it is the specialty of this restaurant.

key_sentences.chinese: 厨师通过调味和烹饪技巧，让食物的味道更加美味。
key_sentences.pinyin: Chú shī tōng guò tiáo wèi hé pēng rèn jì qiǎo, ràng shí wù de wèi dào gèng jiā měi wèi.
key_sentences.english: Through seasoning and cooking techniques, the chef makes the food taste even more delicious.

grammar_points.title: 既...又... — Both...and... (e.g. 既新鲜又营养)
grammar_points.explanation: 既...又... is used to say that something has two positive qualities or characteristics at the same time. Both 既 and 又 are followed by adjectives or verbs. It is similar to 'both...and...' in English. Structure: Subject + 既 + quality A + 又 + quality B. 这道菜既好吃又便宜 - This dish is both delicious and cheap.

examples.chinese: 这道菜肴既营养又美味，非常适合作为家常菜。
examples.pinyin: Zhè dào cài yáo jì yíng yǎng yòu měi wèi, fēi cháng shì hé zuò wéi jiā cháng cài.
examples.english: This dish is both nutritious and delicious; it is very suitable as a home-cooked meal.

examples.chinese: 均衡饮食既能保持健康，又能让人精力充沛。
examples.pinyin: Jūn héng yǐn shí jì néng bǎo chí jiàn kāng, yòu néng ràng rén jīng lì chōng pèi.
examples.english: A balanced diet can both maintain good health and keep a person full of energy.

Jì zhè jiā cān tīng de cài yáo yǒu tè sè, shí huì yòu.
Zhè jiā cān tīng de cài yáo, jì shí huì yǒu tè sè yòu.

Either A or B — a choice between two things
Not A nor B — negating two things
First A, then B — a sequence of steps

jì zhè gè cài hǎo chī yòu pián yi
zhè gè cài hǎo chī jì yòu pián yi

grammar_points.title: 越...越... — The more...the more... (e.g. 越新鲜越好吃)
grammar_points.explanation: 越...越... expresses that as one quality or action increases, another quality or result also increases proportionally. Structure: 越 + verb/adjective A + 越 + verb/adjective B. The subject can be shared or different. 食材越新鲜，菜肴越好吃 - The fresher the ingredients, the more delicious the dish.

examples.chinese: 厨师的烹饪技术越高，做出来的菜肴口味越好。
examples.pinyin: Chú shī de pēng rèn jì shù yuè gāo, zuò chū lái de cài yáo kǒu wèi yuè hǎo.
examples.english: The higher a chef's cooking skill, the better the flavour of the dishes produced.

examples.chinese: 他越按照食谱做菜，越能掌握调味的方法。
examples.pinyin: Tā yuè àn zhào shí pǔ zuò cài, yuè néng zhǎng wò tiáo wèi de fāng fǎ.
examples.english: The more he cooks following the recipe, the better he masters the methods of seasoning.

exercises.question: 食材 _____ 新鲜，菜肴 _____ 好吃。
Choose the correct sentence using 越...越...

options: 他越了解烹饪，越喜欢做菜。
他了解越烹饪，越喜欢做菜。
越他了解烹饪，喜欢越做菜。
他越烹饪了解，越喜欢做菜。
option_pinyin: Tā yuè liǎo jiě pēng rèn, yuè xǐ huān zuò cài.
Tā liǎo jiě yuè pēng rèn, yuè xǐ huān zuò cài.
Yuè tā liǎo jiě pēng rèn, xǐ huān yuè zuò cài.
Tā yuè pēng rèn liǎo jiě, yuè xǐ huān zuò cài.

option_pinyin: tā liàn de yuè duō chú yì yuè hǎo
tā yuè liàn de duō yuè chú yì hǎo
yuè tā liàn de duō chú yì yuè hǎo
tā liàn de duō yuè yuè chú yì hǎo

grammar_points.title: 把 construction for cooking — 把 + ingredient + action (e.g. 把食材切好)
grammar_points.explanation: The 把 construction is very common in cooking contexts. It places the object (usually the ingredient or dish) before the verb to emphasise the result or transformation. Structure: 把 + ingredient/object + verb + result complement. 把蔬菜切好 - Cut the vegetables into shape. 把汤煮热 - Heat the soup. The focus is on what is done to the object.

examples.chinese: 厨师把新鲜食材清洗干净，然后开始按照食谱调味。
examples.pinyin: Chú shī bǎ xīn xiān shí cái qīng xǐ gān jìng, rán hòu kāi shǐ àn zhào shí pǔ tiáo wèi.
examples.english: The chef washed the fresh ingredients clean, then began seasoning according to the recipe.

examples.chinese: 她把那道特色菜肴做得非常好，营养与口味都兼顾到了。
examples.pinyin: Tā bǎ nà dào tè sè cài yáo zuò de fēi cháng hǎo, yíng yǎng yǔ kǒu wèi dōu jiān gù dào le.
examples.english: She prepared that signature dish extremely well, balancing both nutrition and flavour.

exercises.question: 厨师 _____ 食材切成小块，然后下锅翻炒。
Choose the correct sentence using the 把 construction.

options: 她把这道菜肴调味得恰到好处。
她这道菜肴把调味得恰到好处。
把她这道菜肴调味恰到好处得。
她调味这道菜肴把得恰到好处。
option_pinyin: Tā bǎ zhè dào cài yáo tiáo wèi de qià dào hǎo chù.
Tā zhè dào cài yáo bǎ tiáo wèi de qià dào hǎo chù.
Bǎ tā zhè dào cài yáo tiáo wèi qià dào hǎo chù de.
Tā tiáo wèi zhè dào cài yáo bǎ de qià dào hǎo chù.

exercises.question: What does the 把 construction emphasise in cooking contexts?
exercises.correct: The result or transformation done to the ingredient/object
options: The result or transformation done to the ingredient/object
The time at which the cooking happened
The person who is doing the cooking
The reason the food was cooked

Which sentence uses the 把 construction correctly for a cooking context?

options: 她把汤煮好了，端到桌上。
汤她把煮好了，端到桌上。

煮好了她把汤，端到桌上。

Tāng tā bǎ zhǔ hǎo le, duān dào zhuō shàng.
Tā zhǔ bǎ tāng hǎo le, duān dào zhuō shàng.
Zhǔ hǎo le tā bǎ tāng, duān dào zhuō shàng.

mini_exercises.question: In the 把 construction for cooking (e.g. 把食材切好), 把 is used to...
mini_exercises.correct: Move the object before the verb to emphasise the handling or processing of the ingredient
options: Move the object before the verb to emphasise the handling or processing of the ingredient

tā shí cái bǎ qiē hǎo le zhǔn bèi kāi shǐ pēng rèn

culture_notes.title: The Eight Great Cuisines of China
culture_notes.content: China's culinary tradition is one of the richest in the world, and Chinese cuisine is typically categorised into eight regional styles known as the 八大菜系 (bā dà cài xì, Eight Great Cuisines). These include Sichuan (四川), Cantonese (粤菜), Shandong (鲁菜), Jiangsu (苏菜), Zhejiang (浙菜), Fujian (闽菜), Hunan (湘菜), and Anhui (徽菜) cuisines. Each has its own distinct ingredients, cooking techniques (烹饪技术), and flavour profiles (口味). For example, Sichuan cuisine is famous for its bold and spicy flavours, while Cantonese cuisine prioritises the freshness (新鲜) of ingredients and lighter seasoning. Understanding these regional differences is key to appreciating the full depth of Chinese food culture.

idioms.english: Food is the most important thing to the people (food is of paramount importance)

quiz.question: Fill in the blank: 这道菜肴 _____ 营养 _____ 美味，非常受欢迎。
Which sentence uses 既...又... correctly?
quiz.correct: 这份工作既有趣又稳定，他非常满意。
options: 这份工作既有趣又稳定，他非常满意。
这份工作既有趣，稳定又他非常满意。
既这份工作有趣又稳定，他非常满意。
这份工作又有趣既稳定，他非常满意。

quiz.question: Fill in the blank: 食材 _____ 新鲜，菜肴口味 _____ 好。
What does 越...越... express?
quiz.correct: As one thing increases, another increases proportionally
options: As one thing increases, another increases proportionally
Two things happening at the same time

quiz.question: Fill in the blank: 厨师 _____ 食材切成小块，然后按照食谱调味。
What does 饮食 mean?
quiz.correct: Diet; eating habits; food and drink
options: Diet; eating habits; food and drink

quiz.question: How many regional cuisine styles are traditionally recognised in China (the Eight Great Cuisines)?
What does the phrase 品尝美食 mean?
Which grammar pattern means 'both...and...' in describing two simultaneous qualities?
Fill in: 好的厨师会利用新鲜食材来烹饪 _____ 菜肴。

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 王师傅，我想学烹饪，应该从哪里开始？
lines.pinyin: Wáng shī fu, wǒ xiǎng xué pēng rèn, yīng gāi cóng nǎ lǐ kāi shǐ?
lines.english: Master Wang, I want to learn cooking — where should I start?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 先要学会选择食材。食材越新鲜，做出来的菜肴口味越好。
lines.pinyin: Xiān yào xué huì xuǎn zé shí cái. Shí cái yuè xīn xiān, zuò chū lái de cài yáo kǒu wèi yuè hǎo.
lines.english: First you need to learn how to choose ingredients. The fresher the ingredients, the better the flavour of the dish.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 明白了。那调味怎么学？我按照食谱做，但总是感觉味道不对。
lines.pinyin: Míng bai le. Nà tiáo wèi zěn me xué? Wǒ àn zhào shí pǔ zuò, dàn zǒng shì gǎn jué wèi dào bú duì.
lines.english: I understand. How do I learn to season properly? I follow the recipe but the flavour always seems off.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 调味要靠经验。你越做越有感觉，把食材、调料的比例掌握好就行了。
lines.pinyin: Tiáo wèi yào kào jīng yàn. Nǐ yuè zuò yuè yǒu gǎn jué, bǎ shí cái, tiáo liào de bǐ lì zhǎng wò hǎo jiù xíng le.
lines.english: Seasoning relies on experience. The more you cook, the better your feel for it; just master the ratio of ingredients and seasonings.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 这道特色菜既营养又美味，是怎么做的？
lines.pinyin: Zhè dào tè sè cài jì yíng yǎng yòu měi wèi, shì zěn me zuò de?
lines.english: This signature dish is both nutritious and delicious — how is it made?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 先把新鲜食材洗干净，然后按照食谱一步一步做，掌握好火候就好了。
lines.pinyin: Xiān bǎ xīn xiān shí cái xǐ gān jìng, rán hòu àn zhào shí pǔ yí bù yí bù zuò, zhǎng wò hǎo huǒ hòu jiù hǎo le.
lines.english: First wash the fresh ingredients clean, then follow the recipe step by step, and control the heat well.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 好的，我一定要认真学，争取做出既有特色又营养的美食！
lines.pinyin: Hǎo de, wǒ yí dìng yào rèn zhēn xué, zhēng qǔ zuò chū jì yǒu tè sè yòu yíng yǎng de měi shí!
lines.english: Sure, I'll study seriously and strive to cook dishes that are both distinctive and nutritious!

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 加油！记住，越喜欢烹饪，越容易做出好的菜肴。享受这个过程！
lines.pinyin: Jiā yóu! Jì zhù, yuè xǐ huān pēng rèn, yuè róng yì zuò chū hǎo de cài yáo. Xiǎng shòu zhè gè guò chéng!
lines.english: Keep it up! Remember, the more you enjoy cooking, the easier it is to produce great dishes. Enjoy the process!

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 伍尔夫，你最喜欢哪种中国菜？川菜还是粤菜？
lines.pinyin: Wǔ ěr fū, nǐ zuì xǐ huān nǎ zhǒng Zhōng guó cài? Chuān cài hái shì Yuè cài?
lines.english: Woolf, which type of Chinese food do you like most? Sichuan cuisine or Cantonese cuisine?

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 我比较喜欢粤菜，因为粤菜的食材既新鲜又注重营养，口味比较清淡。
lines.pinyin: Wǒ bǐ jiào xǐ huān Yuè cài, yīn wèi Yuè cài de shí cái jì xīn xiān yòu zhù zhòng yíng yǎng, kǒu wèi bǐ jiào qīng dàn.
lines.english: I prefer Cantonese cuisine because its ingredients are both fresh and nutritious, and the flavour is relatively mild.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 川菜的特色是麻辣，越吃越过瘾。厨师们把各种食材和调料搭配得非常有创意。
lines.pinyin: Chuān cài de tè sè shì má là, yuè chī yuè guò yǐn. Chú shī men bǎ gè zhǒng shí cái hé tiáo liào dā pèi de fēi cháng yǒu chuàng yì.
lines.english: The characteristic of Sichuan cuisine is its numbing spiciness — the more you eat, the more you crave it. The chefs match various ingredients and seasonings very creatively.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 中国有八大菜系，每种菜系都有自己的烹饪技术和特色菜，真的很了不起。
lines.pinyin: Zhōng guó yǒu bā dà cài xì, měi zhǒng cài xì dōu yǒu zì jǐ de pēng rèn jì shù hé tè sè cài, zhēn de hěn liǎo bù qǐ.
lines.english: China has eight great regional cuisines, each with its own cooking techniques and signature dishes — it's truly remarkable.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 对。我最近在研究各地的食谱，想试试按照食谱做不同地方的美食。
lines.pinyin: Duì. Wǒ zuì jìn zài yán jiū gè dì de shí pǔ, xiǎng shì shi àn zhào shí pǔ zuò bù tóng dì fāng de měi shí.
lines.english: Right. I've been studying recipes from different regions recently and want to try cooking dishes from various places by following the recipes.

lines.speaker: B
lines.chinese: 那很有意思！记得把食材选新鲜的，这样做出来口味才能好。
lines.pinyin: Nà hěn yǒu yì si! Jì de bǎ shí cái xuǎn xīn xiān de, zhè yàng zuò chū lái kǒu wèi cái néng hǎo.
lines.english: That sounds fun! Remember to choose fresh ingredients — that way the flavour you make will be good.

lines.speaker: A
lines.chinese: 你说得对！均衡饮食，既注重口味，又注意营养，这才是真正的美食之道。
lines.pinyin: Nǐ shuō de duì! Jūn héng yǐn shí, jì zhù zhòng kǒu wèi, yòu zhù yì yíng yǎng, zhè cái shì zhēn zhèng de měi shí zhī dào.
lines.english: You're right! A balanced diet, one that both values flavour and pays attention to nutrition — that is truly the way of gourmet food.
